title: Elūr Heat Wave
lead: A severe heat wave is affecting Elūr with a Z-Score of +3.40. The city is experiencing extremely high temperatures.
body:
The current heat wave in Elūr is causing significant disruptions to daily life. 
 The high temperature is combined with high humidity of 80% and moderate winds of 13.3 km/h. 
 The CDD value of 10.9 GG indicates a high energy demand for cooling.
conclusion: Activate emergency response protocols to mitigate the heat wave's impact.
